title: Feature Infobox

posts.author: Lucait (Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think to eliminate “infobox” it was a really bad Idea.
At the moment in my company we still use an old version.
We open a new CRM account for another division and I have to tell that without infobox to share some documents and to do list on a text editor made it useless Monday for many projects.
It’s a Pity we cannot more use Monday on new projects and we cannot suggest itto our clients.
Hope this feature come back…
I Try the other “third part solution” but it’s a big no…

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
